title: Noah Counts His Family's Hugs
synopsis: Baby Noah discovers counting from one to five as he receives warm hugs from each member of his loving, diverse family throughout a cozy day at home.

pages.text: One hug from Mama! Squeeze, squeeze!

illustration.description: A warm African American woman with natural curly hair in a soft yellow sweater gently hugging baby Noah, a mixed-race toddler with light brown skin and curly dark hair. They're in a sunny kitchen with pastel yellow walls and morning light streaming through a window. Both are smiling with eyes closed in contentment.
illustration.alt: Mama giving Noah a loving hug in the kitchen

pages.text: Two hugs from Papa! Snuggle, snuggle!

illustration.description: A Latino man with warm brown skin and short dark hair wearing a soft blue shirt joins the hug, wrapping his arms around both Mama and Noah. The kitchen background shows soft morning pastels with simple shapes. All three faces show pure joy and love with gentle, rounded features.
illustration.alt: Papa joining for a family group hug

pages.text: Three hugs from Grandma! Cuddle, cuddle!

illustration.description: An elderly Asian woman with silver-gray hair in a soft purple cardigan bends down to hug Noah in a cozy living room. The background features warm peach walls and a plush sofa. Her glasses catch the light as she smiles warmly, and Noah reaches up with chubby arms, giggling.
illustration.alt: Grandma giving Noah a gentle cuddle

pages.text: Four hugs from big sister Zoe! Giggle, giggle!

illustration.description: A cheerful mixed-race girl around age 6 with bouncy curls in colorful hair clips and a bright pink dress hugs Noah playfully. They're on a soft mint green rug in the living room. Both children are laughing with wide, bright smiles and sparkling eyes full of sibling joy.
illustration.alt: Big sister Zoe hugging Noah with giggles

pages.text: Five hugs from baby cousin Emma! Wobble, wobble!

illustration.description: A chubby baby girl with pale skin and wispy blonde hair in a soft lavender onesie attempts to hug Noah. Both babies are sitting on a colorful play mat, wobbling slightly as they embrace. The background shows soft toys in pastel colors, and both babies have that concentrated, serious expression typical of very young children.
illustration.alt: Baby cousin Emma giving Noah a wobbly baby hug

pages.text: One, two, three, four, five! So many hugs for Noah!

illustration.description: All five family members gathered in a big group hug around Noah in the center. The composition forms a warm circle with Noah's delighted face in the middle. The background is a soft gradient of warm pastels - yellow, peach, and lavender. Everyone's faces glow with love and happiness.
illustration.alt: Entire family giving Noah a big group hug

pages.text: Hugs make Noah happy! Yay, yay!

illustration.description: Noah clapping his hands with pure joy, sitting on the colorful play mat surrounded by soft toys. His face radiates happiness with bright, sparkling eyes and a wide smile. The background features gentle rainbow pastels in soft watercolor style, creating a dreamy, joyful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Happy Noah clapping after all his family hugs

pages.text: Time for sleepy hugs! Shhh, shhh!

illustration.description: Noah being tucked into a cozy crib by Mama and Papa together. The nursery glows with soft nighttime colors - deep blues and purples with gentle star patterns on the walls. Noah's eyes are drowsy but content as he holds a soft teddy bear. A gentle nightlight casts warm, soothing light.
illustration.alt: Noah getting tucked in for bedtime with loving parents

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who gave Noah the first hug?
questions.explanation: Mama gave Noah the very first hug with a big squeeze!

questions.question: How many total hugs did Noah get?
questions.explanation: Noah got five wonderful hugs from his loving family!

questions.question: What sound did the baby cousin make?
questions.explanation: Baby cousin Emma went 'wobble, wobble' when she hugged Noah!
